dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7036 IH: Data Driven Diplomacy Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Huizenga introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To increase collaboration within the Department of State between the Office of Opinion Research of the Bureau of Intelligence and Research and the Bureau of Global Public Affairs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Data Driven Diplomacy Act.

section.header: Coordination with the Office of Opinion Research
section.text: The Assistant Secretary for Global Public Affairs shall request the Office of Opinion Research of the Bureau of Intelligence and Research of the Department of State to conduct public opinion surveys that inform the Bureau of Global Public Affairs of the Department of State on cultural context, target audiences, and shifting attitudes towards the United States and United States interests in regions where United States funded media outlets operate or could operate in the future.
